---
title: unhandled-error
description: "Detect ignored error-returning calls."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect ignored error-returning calls. Strider default: common functions.

## Bad

```go
file.Close()
```

## Good

```go
if err := file.Close(); err != nil { return err }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only unhandled-error`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
